aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as relevant content and schema markup, but lacks depth in content optimization, user engagement, and review generation.
quick_wins: Generate and display customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize service pages with location-specific keywords and detailed content.
Implement a blog to target long-tail keywords and establish authority in the HVAC niche.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic business information but lacks structured data for Google Business Profile (GBP) and detailed location-specific content.
gbp_analysis.summary: The website has the foundational elements for GBP but needs to enhance local SEO signals and ensure consistency across all online platforms.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which are crucial for local search visibility.
Inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) information across the website and other platforms.

nap_citations.summary: NAP information is present on the website but may not be consistent across all online directories and platforms.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories, including Google My Business, Yelp, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website, social media profiles, and any other online platforms.

schema_gaps: LocalBusinessSchema with detailed address and contact information
ReviewSchema to display customer reviews and ratings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve local search rankings.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in specific locations within Northern VA and MD.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing service pages with location-specific keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content (e.g., blog posts, guides) to establish the business as an authority in the HVAC industry.
